data.body: Gerrit change 523 pushed: https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/523 (feat(completion-verifier): operator-attested criteria can close signed). All 7 artifacts implemented; make lint+typecheck+test GREEN locally (5274 passed). AC6 offline validation: 'rebar prompt eval completion-verifier' → VALID (10 dataset cases incl. the 4 new operator-attested fixtures, 5 gold-set samples, gating scorers intact); the live dataset behavioral scoring runs in the eval CI ([eval] extra + creds). Awaiting Gerrit Verified +1 before close per project policy.
